prose: The frontier-orbitals calculation on water was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set, in the gas phase, following the chemkit method tier "standard." The total electronic energy is approximately -76.462901 Hartree, and the HOMO-LUMO energy gap is approximately 8.94067 eV. The SCF converged in 7 cycles without warnings or errors. The method used: DFT, tier "standard" (B3LYP/def2-TZVP), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, in PySCF.
